stemHtml: A pilot wishes to demonstrate flying in IMC using only an NDB to a curious passenger who is a retired radar engineer. Which of the following would be a suitable procedure?

options.a: Fly a DME arc and then track a QDM to the station.
options.b: Track the QDR from the NDB for a specified time, then turn to intercept the QDM back to the station.
options.c: Fly between GNSS waypoints and intercept the NDB radial.
options.d: Track a VOR radial and then intercept the NDB.
